'''Forvish ale''' was a kind of [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] [[Ale/Legends|ale]] that carried a distinct odor.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|292|Forvish ale}}</ref> It originated in the [[Forvand system/Legends|Forvand system]]<ref name="TEA" /><ref name="Planetnamia" /> and was enjoyed by several members of the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] organization [[Churhee's Riflemen]].<ref name="GAW">''[[Galaxy at War]]''</ref> In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' to [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]].</ref> [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] [[Diet/Legends|drank]] a strong Forvish ale after a [[Destruction of the Elomin task force|battle]] against a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Elomin task force|task force]].<ref name="HttE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Forvish ale first appeared in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s ''[[Heir to the Empire]]'', the [[1991]] first novel of ''[[Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy]]''.<ref name="HttE" />
